hooks.prompt: If the main agent modified code this session — used Edit, Write, MultiEdit, or NotebookEdit, or ran `git commit` via Bash — respond with: {"decision": "block", "reason": "Before stopping, invoke the simplify-code skill in default/session mode to review and refine the code you modified. Apply project standards in .agents/rules/ or .claude/rules/, preserve behavior, then conclude."}. Otherwise (pure Q&A or planning with no code changes), or if stop_hook_active=true, respond with {} to allow stop.
